data.content:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
\[
h-\text{swish}[x] = x \frac{\text{ReLU}_6(x + 3)}{6}
\]
```

This will render the function `h-swish` defined as `x` multiplied by the result of applying the ReLU6 activation function to `x + 3`, divided by 6.

data.content:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
\text{swish } x = x \cdot \sigma(x)
```

This will render the equation as shown in the image.
